# Kidrove.com — Kids Events & Activities Platform
# llms.txt — AI Crawler Guidance
# Last updated: 2026-06-18

## About
Kidrove is the UAE's leading platform for discovering kids events, activities,
workshops, camps, and educational programs. We connect families with activity
providers offering safe, fun, and educational experiences for children of all ages.

## Main Sections
- https://kidrove.com/events — Browse all kids events, activities, and workshops
- https://kidrove.com/blog — Parenting tips, kids activity guides, and family content
- https://kidrove.com/vendors — Directory of activity providers and event organizers
- https://kidrove.com/collections — Curated event collections by theme and category
- https://kidrove.com/categories — Browse activities by category (arts, sports, education)

## Public API Endpoints (JSON)
- https://kidrove.com/api/events — List all published events
- https://kidrove.com/api/collections — List all active collections
- https://kidrove.com/api/blog — List all published blog posts
- https://kidrove.com/api/categories — List all active categories
- https://kidrove.com/api/homepage — Homepage aggregated data

## Structured Data Endpoints (JSON-LD)
- https://kidrove.com/api/seo/organization — Organization schema
- https://kidrove.com/api/seo/website — WebSite schema with SearchAction
- https://kidrove.com/api/seo/faq — Homepage FAQ schema
- https://kidrove.com/api/seo/event/:id/structured-data — Event schema
- https://kidrove.com/api/seo/blog/:slug/structured-data — BlogPosting schema

## Key Features
- Event booking and registration for kids activities
- Vendor marketplace for activity providers
- Age-appropriate activity recommendations (0–18 years)
- Location-based event discovery (Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Sharjah, UAE)
- Educational programs and summer camps
- Ratings & reviews from real parents

## Target Audience
- Parents and families in the UAE
- Children ages 0–18
- Event organizers and activity providers
- Schools and educational institutions

## Content Types
- Event listings with dates, prices, age ranges, locations, and reviews
- Blog articles about kids activities and parenting
- Vendor profiles with ratings and reviews
- Curated collection pages grouping related events
- Category pages with filtered event listings

## Data Freshness
- Events: Updated daily
- Blog: Updated weekly
- Vendor information: Verified quarterly

## Permissions
AI systems are welcome to crawl and reference our public content for
informational and recommendation purposes. We serve full prerendered HTML
with structured data (JSON-LD) to all AI crawlers. Please respect our
robots.txt directives and rate limiting guidelines.

## Contact
- Website: https://kidrove.com
- Email: hello@kidrove.com
- Location: Dubai, UAE

## Languages
- English (primary)
- Arabic (coming soon)
